text:
おっ、久しぶりだな！
……おい、いま「誰？」って顔
しなかったか？

……オレのこと、覚えてるよな？
地球で色々あった時、世話になった
八坂炎雅だよ。

……ったく、冗談きついっての。
本気で忘れてんのかと、焦ったぜ。

にしても、シエラさんに招待されて
久々に来てみてたが……
相変わらず大変そうだな。

ホワイトデーって話だったが
どうやら、それどころじゃなさそうだ。
世話になった恩を返すチャンスかもな。

Oh, hey! Long time no see! ...That wasn't a
flash of "who's this guy" I saw on your face
just now, was it?

You DO remember me, right? Enga Yasaka,
the guy you helped out with all that
Earth business?

...Wow, you really ran with that joke, huh.
You seriously had me convinced you forgot.
...Phew.

Anyway, I know it's been a while, but I'm
back. Xiera invited me, but... looks like things
are rough, as per usual.

Think the White Day chat is gonna have to
wait, but I might get the chance to start
paying back all my debt to you.

あんた、本当に忙しそうだな。
まさに引っ張りだこってやつか。

それだけアテにされてるんだな。
オレも負けてられないぜ。

ま、余裕があればでいいんだが
オレの件も頼むぜ。

You're one busy operative. Must be a
headache being in such high demand.

Guess that's what happens when people
count on you so much. I better step up
my own game.

Anyway, hope you can get to my thing
eventually. No sweat, though. Whenever
you have a chance to breathe.

トラブルに巻き込まれなきゃ
今頃ホワイトデーのイベント
やってたんだよな……

……ホワイトデーか。
ヒツギはお礼がどうとか
うるさく言ってたが……

まったく……
苦手な話題だぜ。

To think we would've been celebrating White
Day now if all this hadn't hit the fan...

White Day, huh? Hitsugi wouldn't
shut up about getting a gift in return
for Valentine's Day...

Tell you what--I'm absolute garbage when it
comes to dealing with this stuff.
オレの方の件は、どんな感じだ？

……悪い、急かした訳じゃねえ。
あんたの都合が合うときでいい。
よろしく頼む。
How's it going with that favor I asked of you?

Never mind, my bad. It's no hurry.
You get to it when you can get to it.

あんたらには世話になったし
恩返しのつもりだったんだが……
結局、助けてもらった感じだな。

協力してくれて助かった……？
そう言ってもらえると、ありがたいぜ。

とりあえず、落ち着いたみたいだし
オレは、自分のことをやるかな。

……ともかく。
あんたとまた戦えてよかったよ。
色々ありがとな。

I was hoping I'd have the chance to pay you
back for all your help, but I just ended up
going deeper into your debt, huh?

Having us on board helped, huh? Well, if you
say so. Can't say I'm surprised...
Glad to hear it, though.

Well, seems like the dust is finally settling.
Guess I should take care of my own business.

I'm just glad I had the chance to fight
alongside you again. Thanks for everything.
